requirement_text: RTI shall support registration modification and deletion of object instances
RTI shall support sending and receiving interactions
RTI shall discover object instances at subscribed federates when discovery conditions are satisfied
RTI shall determine a candidate discovery class from the registered class or closest subscribed superclass
Once discovered an object instance discovered class shall not change
A registered or discovered object instance shall become known to the joined federate
RTI shall determine whether an instance attribute is in scope for each joined federate
RTI shall reflect attribute updates only when attributes are in scope and subscribed
RTI shall not reflect out of scope attribute updates except where required by service semantics
RTI shall determine attribute relevance from publication subscription ownership and scope
RTI shall handle orphan object instances according to ownership and discovery rules
RTI shall deliver interactions to joined federates subscribed to the relevant interaction class
RTI shall use transportation types for object updates and interactions as defined by the FDD and service arguments
RTI shall support explicit reliable transportation type selection query reporting and restore persistence for object updates and interactions in the currently supported transport subset
RTI shall support distinct best-effort versus reliable delivery semantics for object updates and interactions when the FDD and service arguments select different transportation types
RTI shall preserve externally visible reflect interaction request-update and time-managed callback semantics for the implemented direct unbatched delivery subset
RTI shall throttle timed reflected attribute delivery according to explicit and FOM-declared update-rate designators while preserving receive-order delivery that has no logical-time basis
RTI shall provide Reserve Object Instance Name
RTI shall invoke Object Instance Name Reserved when a reservation succeeds
RTI shall provide Release Object Instance Name
RTI shall provide Reserve Multiple Object Instance Names
RTI shall invoke Multiple Object Instance Names Reserved when multiple-name reservation succeeds
RTI shall provide Release Multiple Object Instance Names
RTI shall provide Register Object Instance
Register Object Instance shall create an object instance of a published object class
RTI shall assign a unique object instance handle to each registered object instance
RTI shall support registration with RTI assigned or federate supplied object instance names
RTI shall invoke Discover Object Instance at federates satisfying discovery conditions
RTI shall provide Update Attribute Values
A federate shall update only attributes it owns and is permitted to publish
RTI shall route attribute updates to joined federates with relevant subscriptions and scope
RTI shall support RO and TSO attribute updates according to time management rules
RTI shall deliver reflected attribute updates with transportation metadata that matches the currently implemented reliable and best-effort transport subset
RTI shall invoke Reflect Attribute Values to deliver attribute updates
Reflected attributes shall correspond to attributes available at the object instance known class
RTI shall provide Send Interaction
A federate shall send only interaction classes it has published
Sent interaction parameters shall be available parameters of the interaction class
RTI shall support RO and TSO interactions according to time management rules
RTI shall deliver received interactions with transportation metadata that matches the currently implemented reliable and best-effort transport subset
RTI shall invoke Receive Interaction for matching subscribed federates
RTI shall provide Delete Object Instance
Delete Object Instance shall remove an object instance from the federation execution according to ownership and time rules
RTI shall invoke Remove Object Instance at federates that know the deleted object instance
RTI shall provide Local Delete Object Instance
Local Delete Object Instance shall remove knowledge of the object instance only at the invoking federate
RTI shall invoke Attributes In Scope when subscribed attributes become in scope
RTI shall invoke Attributes Out Of Scope when subscribed attributes go out of scope
RTI shall provide Request Attribute Value Update
Request Attribute Value Update shall cause relevant owning federates to receive a request to provide current values
RTI shall invoke Provide Attribute Value Update at relevant owning federates when Request Attribute Value Update selects their object instance attributes
Provide Attribute Value Update shall carry the requested object instance handle attribute set and user supplied tag for each relevant owning federate
RTI shall invoke Turn Updates On For Object Instance when subscribed demand makes a published object instance attribute set newly relevant to the owning federate
Turn Updates On For Object Instance shall carry the object instance handle relevant attribute set and applicable update rate designator when one is in effect
RTI shall invoke Turn Updates Off For Object Instance when subscribed demand no longer exists for a published object instance attribute set
RTI shall provide Request Attribute Transportation Type Change across the full transportation semantic space defined by the standard

RTI shall support Request Attribute Transportation Type Change for the currently implemented reliable and best-effort transport subset and shall persist that selected attribute transport state across restore
RTI shall invoke Confirm Attribute Transportation Type Change when a requested attribute transport change takes effect across the full standard transportation semantic space
RTI shall invoke Confirm Attribute Transportation Type Change for the currently implemented reliable and best-effort transport subset
RTI shall not emit Confirm Attribute Transportation Type Change when the corresponding change request is rejected for invalid state handle ownership publication or transport inputs
RTI shall provide Query Attribute Transportation Type across the full transportation semantic space defined by the standard
RTI shall report stored attribute transportation overrides for the currently implemented reliable and best-effort transport subset
RTI shall invoke Report Attribute Transportation Type across the full transportation semantic space defined by the standard
RTI shall invoke Report Attribute Transportation Type for the currently implemented reliable and best-effort transport subset
RTI shall not emit Report Attribute Transportation Type when the corresponding query is rejected for invalid state object or attribute inputs
RTI shall provide Request Interaction Transportation Type Change across the full transportation semantic space defined by the standard

RTI shall support Request Interaction Transportation Type Change for the currently implemented reliable and best-effort transport subset and shall persist that selected interaction transport state across restore
RTI shall invoke Confirm Interaction Transportation Type Change when a requested interaction transport change takes effect across the full standard transportation semantic space
RTI shall invoke Confirm Interaction Transportation Type Change for the currently implemented reliable and best-effort transport subset
RTI shall not emit Confirm Interaction Transportation Type Change when the corresponding change request is rejected for invalid state class publication or transport inputs
RTI shall provide Query Interaction Transportation Type across the full transportation semantic space defined by the standard
RTI shall report stored interaction transportation overrides for the currently implemented reliable and best-effort transport subset
RTI shall invoke Report Interaction Transportation Type across the full transportation semantic space defined by the standard
RTI shall invoke Report Interaction Transportation Type for the currently implemented reliable and best-effort transport subset
RTI shall not emit Report Interaction Transportation Type when the corresponding query is rejected for invalid state or invalid interaction inputs
